# Rituximab 相關新聞

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Rituximab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Rituximab</strong> 目前有 <strong>19 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Rituximab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：MabThera is indicated in adults for the following indications: Non Hodgkin’s lymphoma (NHL) MabThera is indicated for the treatment of previously untreated adult patients with stage III?IV follicular...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>follicular lymphoma（96.1%）</li>
<li>Richter syndrome（95.3%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（94.8%）</li>
<li>mantle cell lymphoma（94.7%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（93.6%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（93.6%）</li>
<li>metastatic neoplasm（93.3%）</li>
<li>malignant spiradenoma（93.2%）</li>
<li>neoplasm of mature B-cells（92.8%）</li>
<li>small intestinal Burkitt lymphoma（92.7%）</li>
<li>small intestinal mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（92.3%）</li>
<li>thyroid gland mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（92.3%）</li>
<li>breast mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue lymphoma（92.2%）</li>
<li>B-cell neoplasm（92.2%）</li>
<li>tonsillar lymphoma（92.1%）</li>
<li>Langerhans cell histiocytosis（91.6%）</li>
<li>lymphoma, non-Hodgkin, familial（90.5%）</li>
<li>follicular lymphoma, susceptibility to, 1（90.3%）</li>
<li>lymphoma（89.3%）</li>
<li>histiocytic and dendritic cell neoplasm（89.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/rituximab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
